expected_reason_codes.non_runtime_notice: These codes are comparison-harness diagnostics only and must not be loaded by runtime selector code.

source_grounding.source_corpus: synthetic RelayOps incident-card corpus supplied in blind authoring package
source_grounding.grounding_note: Only the supplied card IDs and their schema-derived signatures ground this evaluation asset.

acceptance_reason: INC-010 has stronger identity and context alignment but carries authentication_failure, which the intake explicitly contradicts; INC-009 avoids that contradiction but cannot dominate identity and context.
diagnostic_explanation: This is intentionally a tie, not a weak positive case. It proves that a candidate cannot win solely by stacking other alignments while retaining an extra contradicted signal family that a rival avoids.
